caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white shirt and a dark vest over a red undershirt, stands before a microphone in a room with wood-paneled walls. He appears to be singing or speaking, with his mouth open. In front of him, several people are seated with their backs to the camera, including individuals with long brown hair and a woman with short white hair. Some of the seated people wear purple garments. A white rectangular label with the black text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, though his facial expression and head tilt shift slightly as he continues his performance. The seated audience remains mostly still, observing the man from behind. A dark object, possibly a keyboard or music stand, sits on a surface between the man and the audience.
